apple.c(3) Library Functions Manual apple.c(3)

NAME

apple.c - Apple unified logging (os_log) integration.

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define APPLE_LOG_SUBSYSTEM 'com.ascii-chat'
#define APPLE_LOG_CATEGORY 'default'

Functions


void platform_log_hook (log_level_t level, const char *message)

Detailed Description

Apple unified logging (os_log) integration.

Routes ascii-chat log messages to Apple's unified logging system via os_log. Messages appear in Console.app and are queryable with the log CLI tool:

log stream --predicate 'subsystem == "chat.ascii.ascii-chat"' --level debug

Definition in file apple.c.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define APPLE_LOG_CATEGORY 'default'

#define APPLE_LOG_SUBSYSTEM 'com.ascii-chat'

Function Documentation

void platform_log_hook (log_level_t level, const char * message)

Definition at line 52 of file apple.c.

52                                                                {
53     if (!message) {
54         return;
55     }
56 
57     os_log_t log = get_apple_log();
58 
59     // Strip ANSI escape codes for clean system log output
60     char clean[4096];
61     strip_ansi_codes(message, clean, sizeof(clean));
62 
63     os_log_with_type(log, level_to_os_log_type(level), "%{public}s", clean);
64 }
